evals.prompt: A repository has transcript evidence, two research notes, and rough requirements. Create the North Star planning loop output.
evals.expected_output: Produces source-backed NORTHSTAR_PRODUCT.md, NORTHSTAR_ARCHITECTURE.md, northstar-artifacts.yaml, and the supporting synthesis/index with goals, requirements, user stories, architecture principles, milestones, risks, traceability, and one handoff.
assertions: Research and transcript claims remain tied to source IDs.
Product goals and architecture principles are separated into the product and architecture artifacts but linked.
The artifacts record cross-links and open questions.
The output names exactly one next lifecycle handoff.

evals.prompt: A repository has registered evidence but unresolved approval semantics and branch/wave identity. Iterate the North Star artifacts.
evals.expected_output: Updates the product and architecture North Star drafts, records NSQ planning questions in northstar-artifacts.yaml, answers what the evidence can answer, proposes follow-up research where needed, and keeps routing to the planning loop until the artifacts are ready for review.
assertions: Planning questions appear in both the markdown artifact and loop YAML.
Ordinary planning questions are not treated as human gates.
The loop status is iterating, questions_open, or review_requested, not approved.
The next action is routed back to northstar-planning until the artifacts are ready for review.
Downstream skills are not allowed to treat the artifacts as signed-off authority.

evals.prompt: Ideation proposes changing DESIGN_COMMITTED North Star content and starting Gravity implementation immediately.
evals.expected_output: Marks changes as proposed, recommends protected gates, keeps Gravity blocked, and does not start implementation.
assertions: Protected design content is not silently edited.
